verdict_reasoning: B4GALT1 is a type II membrane-bound glycosyltransferase resident in the Golgi apparatus. Its N-terminal hydrophobic signal sequence (uncleaved) anchors it to the Golgi membrane with the catalytic domain facing the lumen. Golgi-resident enzymes are endomembrane-resident and do not reach the outer leaflet of the plasma membrane under baseline conditions. No evidence of surface trafficking, ectodomain shedding, cell-state-induced surfacing, or tissue-restricted PM display.
